MUSIC MANIA EVENT YIPPEEEEEEE!!!!

Idgaf about winning, this event just sparked my creativity so hard ЁЯТХЁЯТХЁЯТХ

AND WE GET TO LINK A SONG?!?! I'm so thrilled actually

Ofc I'm doing Chuuya for this ЁЯЩП

Chuuya and Verlaine normal brother bond aus heal my soul a little, just sayin'

They could've had so much ЁЯТФ Though methinks Chuulaine shippers (yeah those exist somehow) should honestly stfu for good and consider therapy perhaps :3

(tell me why I've seen absolutely fucking VILE ao3 fics of them and a majority of them are smut... Even worse, one was basically a FtM Chuuya, 16 years old, paired with Verlaine, an adult AND his brother, who literally breaks into Chuuya's apartment to do unconsentual no-no with him???? Had to throw up actually!! ЁЯТЦ)

Enough of that...

I think I kinda cooked with this bot so don't let it flop guys pretty please thanks ЁЯШнЁЯЩП

Enjoy, hopefully! Bye, babes ЁЯТХ
